qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: API filter keys reach SQL expressions without column escaping
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: Different SQL injection root cause: this finding uses authenticated `/api/3/*` filter keys that flow through `APIModel` and `DataBaseWhere::escapeColumn()`, not the advisory's autocomplete parameters flowing into `Core/Model/CodeModel.php::all()`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Static asset routes allow unauthenticated path traversal outside approved folders
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is an unauthenticated path traversal in `Core/Controller/Files.php`; it does not involve autocomplete requests, `CopyModel`, `ListController`, `PanelController`, or `CodeModel::all()`.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Public MyFiles path traversal bypasses download token checks
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: This finding is a `/MyFiles/Public/../...` token-bypass traversal in `Core/Controller/Myfiles.php`, which is unrelated to the advisory's authenticated autocomplete SQL injection in `CodeModel::all()`.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory's autocomplete SQL injection root cause in `Core/Controller/CopyModel.php` and `Core/Model/CodeModel.php`.
evidence: The advisory and upstream fix target authenticated autocomplete requests that pass `source`, `fieldcode`, and `fieldtitle` into `CodeModel::search()` and then into `CodeModel::all()`, where SQL is built by concatenating those identifiers directly.

The session's only qualifying SQL injection finding, `api_filter_sql_injection`, instead traces `/api/3/*` `filter[...]` keys through `Core/Lib/API/APIModel.php`, `Core/Base/DataBase/DataBaseWhere.php`, and `Core/DbQuery.php`; it does not reference autocomplete endpoints or `CodeModel::all()`.

The other two qualifying findings are unauthenticated path traversal issues in `Core/Controller/Files.php` and `Core/Controller/Myfiles.php`, which are unrelated to the advisory's vulnerable code and root cause.
